subject: Travel documents Ref. QAJV6E
body:
QAJV6E

.style1
{
width: 26%;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 320px) {
.ctw-columns {
width: 100% !important;
}
.ctw-column-container {
display: block !important;
width: 100% !important;
}
.ctw-box {
display: block !important;
width: 100% !important;
}
}

@media (max-width: 489px) {

span[class="logo-swapper"] {
display: inline-block;
background-image: url(https://www.norwegian.no/globalassets/ip/media/crm/receipt/etr/ETR_36x33_ident-mobile.svg) !important;
background-position: right !important;
background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
width: 75px;
height: 61px;
}

img[class="swap-logo"], img[class="swap-header"] {
display: none !important;
}

td[class="logo-swap-shrink"] {
width: 75px !important;
}

}

Booking Confirmation

Thank you for booking with Norwegian.

You will need to bring valid photo ID to check in. A valid passport and visa may be required when travelling to certain destinations. For more information regarding ID requirements, please visit www.norwegian.com. We recommend that you print out the travel documents for your flights.

YOUR BOOKING REFERENCE IS:

QAJV6E

Avoid hand baggage charges at the airport

We have limited space for hand baggage on board, and we ask you to make sure your hand baggage meets our requirements to avoid charges at the airport. It’s up to 50% cheaper to purchase extra checked baggage online (up to 3 hours before departure) instead of at the airport.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Travel documents

This email includes travel documents for all passengers and all flights.

A free PDF reader may be downloaded from
http://get.adobe.com/reader

Children travelling alone – unaccompanied minors

Please download and present the completed unaccompanied minor form at check-in (total 3 pages).

Check-in and boarding

All passengers must adhere to check-in and boarding deadlines. Information can be found on your travel documents.

All baggage must be labelled with the passenger's name, address and phone number.

This is a Norwegian retail site, hence Norwegian legislation and rules apply to any fees and/or charges. For Terms and Conditions, please visit

www.norwegian.com

Follow us on:

Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA. PO Box 115, NO-1330 Fornebu. Fax +47 67 59 30 01,

Contact us. NO 965 920 358 MVA
